metadata.description: SEO analysis tools for Claude Code

plugins.name: claude-seo
plugins.description: Comprehensive SEO analysis skill for Claude Code. 19 sub-skills covering technical SEO, E-E-A-T, schema markup, GEO/AEO, backlinks, local SEO, maps intelligence, Google API integration (GSC, PageSpeed, CrUX, GA4), and PDF/Excel reporting.
